name: pi-subagent
description: Delegate to named Pi subagents (.md persona + model + tools, incl. MCP) and bounded coding tasks from Claude Code. Bundles a local stdio MCP server that launches Pi (pi --mode rpc), isolates code edits in git worktrees, and returns compact summaries plus diff paths — never applying changes automatically.

pi_path.title: Pi executable path
pi_path.description: Path to the Pi executable. Use an absolute path if `pi` is not on PATH for the MCP server process.

default_provider.title: Default provider
default_provider.description: Default Pi provider (e.g. anthropic, openai, google). Empty means use Pi's own configured default.

default_model.title: Default model
default_model.description: Default Pi model pattern or id (supports 'provider/id' and ':<thinking>'). Empty means use Pi's configured default.

default_thinking.title: Default thinking level
default_thinking.description: Default Pi thinking level: off, minimal, low, medium, high, or xhigh.

max_parallel_tasks.title: Max parallel tasks
max_parallel_tasks.description: Maximum number of Pi tasks allowed to run concurrently.

default_timeout_seconds.title: Default timeout (seconds)
default_timeout_seconds.description: Default wall-clock timeout for a single Pi task run, in seconds.

use_worktrees_by_default.title: Use git worktrees by default
use_worktrees_by_default.description: Isolate each task in a detached git worktree by default. Strongly recommended for patch/test modes.

allow_apply_tool.title: Allow apply-result tool
allow_apply_tool.description: Register the pi_apply_result tool, which can apply a task's diff into the project. Off by default for safety.

agents_dir.title: Extra pi-agents directory
agents_dir.description: Optional extra directory of named pi-agent .md definitions. Always searched in addition to ~/.pi/agents, <project>/.pi/agents, and <project>/pi-agents (this override wins name collisions).
